heading: Add Semantic Caching
body:
This section adds semantic caching on top of your RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) chain.
Semantic caching is a form of caching that
retrieves cached prompts based on the semantic similarity
between queries.

> **Note:** You can use semantic caching independently of conversation memory,
> but you use both features together for this tutorial.

For a video tutorial of this feature,
see [Learn by Watching](langchain-semantic-cache-video).
